name: Hearthside Food Solutions
description: Hearthside Food Solutions is a leading granola manufacturer with expertise in crafting a variety of granola recipes, including natural options and those with nuts, seeds, and dried fruit. Their extensive production facilities and innovative approach position them as a key player in the granola market.

name: Granol Indústria Comércio e Exportação S/A
description: Granol is a Brazilian manufacturer that specializes in high-quality grains and related products. With over 60 years of experience, the company emphasizes quality and has a significant production capacity.

name: Silvery Tweed Cereals
description: Silvery Tweed Cereals specializes in processing and supplying premium cereal products, including unique granola clusters with fruit-flavored coatings. Their commitment to quality and innovation in the cereal industry positions them as a key supplier for those seeking diverse granola options.

name: General Mills Convenience & Foodservice
description: General Mills North America Foodservice offers a variety of quality products, including Nature Valley™ Parfait Granola Cereal, which is available in bulk. This highlights the company's commitment to providing food solutions for sectors like schools and hospitals.

name: Bagrry's
description: Bagrry’s offers a delicious Superfood Granola featuring Exotic Fruits with Cranberries and Almonds, made from high-quality ingredients like mangoes, strawberries, and oats, promoting a nutritious breakfast option. With over 50 years of experience in health foods, the company emphasizes quality and innovation in its product offerings.

name: La Newyorkina
description: The company specializes in handmade organic granola, offering a diverse range of flavors and dietary options, including sugar-free and gluten-free varieties. Their granola is crafted without preservatives or colorants, using extra olive oil, making it a nutritious choice for any time of day.

name: PT Alami Natural Organik - Granola Addict
description: Granola Addict offers high-quality, preservative-free granola that promotes healthy snacking habits. Their products are organic and rich in nutrients, making them a great choice for those looking to maintain a healthy lifestyle.

name: Granolust
description: Granolust offers a premium collection of vegan and gluten-free granola, quickly becoming a popular choice in Montreal. Their unique flavors, such as Maple Quinoa Crunch and Rosemary Parmesan Crunch, provide a guilt-free indulgence made with high-quality, organic ingredients.

name: Cerealto
description: The company specializes in the development and production of cereal-based products, including various granola bars with different flavors like red fruits, syrup, and crunchy coconut. This focus on granola aligns with their expertise in the agri-food sector.

name: Back Roads Granola
description: Back Roads Granola specializes in producing high-quality, certified organic granola that is non-GMO, gluten-free, and vegan. Their Original Granola is packed with nuts, seeds, and fruit, making it a nutritious snack or breakfast option with low sugar and no sodium.
